head.hi: The Research Committee of the Inquiry to the Division Chiefs

div.p: Kindly inform the men working under your direction that we are now in touch with the following government organizations, and that the Inquiry would be glad to receive requests for information or suggestions as to work that might be done. It is understood that all such requests or suggestions should pass through the hands of the Executive Officer.

list.item: Bureau of the Census, Department of Commerce
U. S. Geological Survey, Department of the Interior
U. S. Forest Service, Department of Agriculture
Bureau of Soils, Department of Agriculture
Office of Farm Management, Department of Agriculture
Bureau of Plant Industries, Department of Agriculture
Division of Foreign Tariffs, Bureau of Foreign and Domestic Commerce, Department of Commerce
Division of Latin American Affairs, State Department
Bureau of Research, War Trade Board
Division of Planning and Statistics, War Industries Board and U. S. Shipping Board

National Research Council
Anthropology Committee
Medical Research Committee

div.p: In the case of the Military Intelligence Division, Colonel Dunn has even offered to cable any or all of the military attachés for especially urgent information. The existing liaison between the M. I. D. and the Inquiry enables us to tap practically any source of information in the country.
